ADMIN FILTER CHAIN SETUP:\n   - admin_filter.h and admin_filter.cc define the AdminFilter class that extends Http::PassThroughFilter\n   - AdminFilter::decodeHeaders() (admin_filter.cc:10) processes incoming HTTP requests to the admin interface\n   - AdminFilter::onComplete() (admin_filter.cc:83) routes requests to the appropriate handler\n   - admin.h defines AdminFilterChain (line 421-445) which is the filter chain factory for admin endpoints\n   - AdminImpl::createNetworkFilterChain() (admin.cc:289) creates the HTTP connection manager with the admin filter\n   - AdminImpl::AdminListener (admin.h:366-418) configures the listener for the admin interface\n\n4. SUPPORTING FILES:\n   - handler_ctx.h: Base class HandlerContextBase for handler implementations\n   - admin_factory_context.h: Factory context for creating admin components\n   - config_tracker_impl.cc/h: Tracks and provides access to configuration\n   - stats_request.cc/h: Handles stats request parsing and streaming\n   - stats_render.cc/h: Renders statistics in text format\n   - stats_html_render.cc/h: Renders statistics in HTML format\n   - stats_params.cc/h: Parses stats request parameters\n   - admin_html_util.cc/h: HTML utilities for the admin UI\n   - utils.cc/h: Admin utility functions\n\nThe request flow: Network connection → AdminListener → createNetworkFilterChain → Http::ConnectionManagerImpl → AdminFilter::decodeHeaders/onComplete → AdminImpl::request → handler routing based on URL prefix → specific endpoint handler → response"
